summary: Backend-only regression + innovation pass. Built /app/backend/tests/test_grynd_innovation.py with 22 pytest cases covering existing regression (auth/me, quests list, journals CRUD, leaderboard, QRIS), the new combo/shield mechanic on /api/quests/{id}/complete, AI Quest Coach (en + id) and accept-persistence, full friend system (codes, add, list, idempotency, add-self error, bad code 404, high-five +5 XP and idempotency, friends leaderboard), public profile HTML with OG meta tags, OG SVG image, and idempotent push token registration. All 22 tests PASSED against the external preview URL.

minor.issue: Friend-code normalization uses code.lstrip('GRYND-').lstrip('-') which has set semantics, not prefix semantics. Any code whose first characters happen to be in {G,R,Y,N,D,-} could be silently mangled before the 'GRYND-' prefix is reattached. Tests passed because real codes already begin with 'GRYND-' (the if-branch never triggers in practice), but it's a latent bug. Use code.removeprefix('GRYND-').lstrip('-') (Py3.9+).

action_items: (Minor) Replace lstrip('GRYND-') in friend/add with removeprefix('GRYND-') to fix set-vs-prefix semantics.
(Optional) Address PytestRemovedIn10Warning by making class-scoped fixtures classmethods.
critical_code_review_comments: complete_quest: combo award logic is correct but reads current_xp + total_xp after a write race could overlap if user double-taps; consider $inc-style atomic update for production-grade concurrency. Currently fine for single-device use.
friend_add: lstrip set-semantics bug (see minor issues).
ai_coach: uses lazy import of emergentintegrations inside the handler which adds latency on first call; consider top-level import to surface missing-package errors early.
server.py is 1250+ lines — recommend splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/quests.py, routers/social.py, etc. for maintainability.
test_credentials: tester@grynd.app / Tester123! (worked). Also dynamically registered fresh combo-* and fr-user-* users for isolation.
seed_data_creation: Per-run: one fresh combo-{uuid} user (5 health + 1 study quests completed), one fr-user-{uuid} user for friend flow, plus 3 AITEST-{marker} quests on tester via /ai/accept. All TEST_/AITEST-/combo-/fr-user- prefixed for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Combo mechanic depends on the user's combo_last_at/combo_category fields; tests use freshly-registered users to keep deterministic chains. tester@grynd.app accumulates AI-accepted TEST quests + a friend each run — safe to leave or purge. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is configured and Gemini-3-Flash returned valid JSON for both en and id in ~3-6s. Public-profile HTML page lives at /api/u/{username} (HTML 200 / 404 both return text/html); OG image at /api/og/{username}.svg (image/svg+xml).
